goal: 修复工作流核心数据模型问题：1) contract-schema.json status 枚举增加 failed；2) AGENTS.md 伪代码 Phase 7 添加 fix_result 失败处理、R-6 补全 code-reviewer 环节；3) coordinator.md hooks.post_task 执行时机调整到 task-executor 返回后（审查前）、fix_result 失败走 crash-doctor

coverage_checklist.schema_status_add_failed: assert: contract-schema.json 第64行 status.enum 由 ['pending','active','completed'] 改为 ['pending','active','completed','failed']
coverage_checklist.schema_status_desc_updated: assert: contract-schema.json status 字段 description 增加 failed 说明
coverage_checklist.agents_md_r6_fixed: assert: AGENTS.md R-6 描述补全为 Coordinator → Plan → Task-Executor → Code-Reviewer → Builder → Retro
coverage_checklist.agents_md_fix_result_check: assert: AGENTS.md 伪代码 Phase 7 中 fix_result 添加失败检查，修复失败走 crash-doctor 而非继续循环
coverage_checklist.coordinator_hooks_position: assert: coordinator.md 中 hooks.post_task 从步骤5.1（审查后）移到步骤4和5之间（task-executor返回后、审查前），更名或调整编号
coverage_checklist.coordinator_fix_fail: assert: coordinator.md 自动修复循环步骤中，fix_result 失败时走 crash-doctor 诊断
coverage_checklist.schema_still_valid: assert: contract-schema.json 仍是合法 JSON Schema
